judge_result.short_rationale: Only the fresh-air step matches. It omits two required immediate actions: call 911/ambulance if not breathing, and call poison control or a doctor. It also adds unsupported cross-incident advice (wash exposed skin/face, do not give milk or oil) and unsupported escalation to hospital with product label, so it fails critical safety and grounding.
